generate.title: [hi] Generate Study Materials
generate.description: [hi] Enter any academic topic. LearnMint AI will generate notes, a 30-question quiz, and 20 flashcards, then take you to the Study Hub.
generate.toast.invalidTopicDesc: [hi] Topic must be at least 3 characters long.
audioFactory.title: [hi] Audio Factory
audioFactory.description: [hi] Generate spoken summaries from text, images, or documents, and create audio flashcards.
audioFactory.flashcards.title: [hi] Audio Flashcards Generator
audioFactory.flashcards.description: [hi] Create flashcards with male & female voice narration.
audioFactory.image.title: [hi] Image Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.image.description: [hi] Upload an image to get a spoken summary of its content.
audioFactory.pdf.title: [hi] PDF Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.pdf.description: [hi] Upload a PDF to get a spoken summary of its content.
audioFactory.imageTooLarge: [hi] Image is too large. Please upload an image under 2MB.
audioFactory.pdfTooLarge: [hi] PDF is too large. Please upload a file under 5MB.
audioFactory.pdfExtractError: [hi] Could not extract text from the PDF.
audioFactory.discussion.successDesc: [hi] The audio discussion is ready to be listened to.
audioFactory.discussion.title: [hi] Audio Discussion
audioFactory.audioNotSupported: [hi] Your browser does not support the audio element.
audioFactory.text.title: [hi] Text Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.text.description: [hi] Paste any text to get a brief audio summary.

audioFactory.text.errorDesc: [hi] Please provide at least 50 characters to summarize.
audioFactory.pdf.errorDesc: [hi] Please upload and extract text from a PDF first.

quiz.removed.title: [hi] Feature Removed

chatbot.gojo.name: [hi] Gojo AI
chatbot.holo.name: [hi] Holo AI
chatbot.megumin.name: [hi] Megumin AI
chatbot.gojo.description: [hi] The Honored One is here to help.
chatbot.gojo.greeting: [hi] Yo! Took you long enough. I thought I was gonna have to fight off the boredom without you.
chatbot.holo.greeting: [hi] Ah, the little one returns. Have you come to bask in my brilliance again?
chatbot.megumin.greeting: [hi] Hahahaha! You have sought out the greatest wielder of Explosion magic! What knowledge do you seek from I, Megumin?!
chatbot.megumin.typing: [hi] Megumin is concentrating on her spell...
chatbot.gojo.errorMessage: [hi] My technique must have fizzled out. Ask again, I wasn't paying attention.
chatbot.holo.errorMessage: [hi] My thoughts must have wandered to a distant harvest. Ask again.
chatbot.megumin.errorMessage: [hi] My genius... it must be on cooldown! Ask again, and witness true power!
chatbot.gojo.errorToast: [hi] Hoh? Something went wrong. Let's try that again.
chatbot.holo.errorToast: [hi] Hmph. My wisdom must have been too much for this device. Try again.
chatbot.megumin.errorToast: [hi] Waaaah! My mana is out of balance! The spell failed!
chatbot.toast.pdfTruncatedDesc: [hi] The provided PDF was long and has been truncated to ensure a timely response.
chatbot.placeholder: [hi] Type your message or ask a question...
chatbot.file.image.tooLargeDesc: [hi] Please upload an image smaller than 4MB.
chatbot.file.pdf.tooLargeDesc: [hi] Please upload a PDF smaller than 10MB.
chatbot.file.pdf.successDesc: [hi] {{name}} is ready to be sent with your message.
chatbot.file.pdf.errorDesc: [hi] Could not extract text from the PDF.
chatbot.file.unsupportedDesc: [hi] Chat supports Image, PDF, audio and video uploads.
chatbot.voiceError.title: [hi] Voice Input Error

library.books.noResults: [hi] No books found for "{{term}}". Try a different search.
library.books.toast.noResultsDesc: [hi] Try a different search term. Make sure your GOOGLE_BOOKS_API_KEY is valid and the Google Books API is enabled.
library.books.toast.errorDesc: [hi] Could not fetch books. Make sure the GOOGLE_BOOKS_API_KEY is valid.
library.books.toast.openingExternalDesc: [hi] This book will be opened on the Google Books website.

library.resources.wikidataDesc: [hi] A free and open knowledge base that can be read and edited by both humans and machines.
news.title: [hi] Global News Terminal
news.description: [hi] Stay up-to-date with the latest news. Filter by keywords, country, category, and more.
news.filters.regionSelectDisabledTooltip: [hi] Select a country to enable the State/Region filter
news.filters.regionTypeDisabledTooltip: [hi] Select a country to enable the State/Region keyword search
news.filters.cityDisabledTooltip: [hi] Select a country to enable the City keyword search
news.filters.behaviorNote: [hi] "Top Headlines" is the default category. If a specific country is chosen, State/Region may become a dropdown. State/Region and City terms refine the search within the selected country if provided. The default language is English.
news.error.title: [hi] News API Error
news.error.message: [hi] Error fetching news: {{error}} This may be due to an invalid or rate-limited API key for Newsdata.io, or a network issue. Please check your NEWSDATA_API_KEY in your .env file and ensure it is set correctly if deployed.
news.noArticles.title: [hi] No news articles found.
news.noArticles.description: [hi] Try adjusting your search or filters.
news.toast.noHeadlinesDesc: [hi] No news headlines available to read.
